text.title: Stakeholder Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying stakeholder management end-to-end.

step.name: list-stakeholders
step.action: Use sonnet to extract all stakeholders touching the project.

step.name: tag-three-axes
step.decision-gate: If attitude can't be inferred, schedule a 1:1 before continuing.

step.name: map-cadence-per-quadrant
step.action: Map each stakeholder to a written cadence (frequency + channel + content).

step.name: assign-decision-rights
step.action: Author D/I/V per decision type per stakeholder.
step.decision-gate: If any decision has no D, escalate to head of product.

step.name: pre-register-escalation
step.action: Author trigger -> escalate_to pairs + upward comms cadence.
